Module com.hack23.cia.web
Package com.hack23.cia.web.impl.ui.application.views.contracts

Interface IUserView

All Superinterfaces:
IView, java.io.Serializable, com.vaadin.navigator.View
All Known Implementing Classes:
AbstractActorView, AbstractGroupView, AbstractPersonView, AbstractRankingView, AbstractUserView, BallotView, CommitteeRankingView, CommitteeView, CountryRankingView, DocumentsView, DocumentView, GovernmenBodyView, GovernmentBodyRankingView, MinistryRankingView, MinistryView, ParliamentRankingView, PartyRankingView, PartyView, PoliticianRankingView, PoliticianView, SearchDocumentView, UserHomeView
public interface IUserView extends IView
The Interface IUserView. Contract for user-facing views in the application.
